tool.name: Haystack
tool.description: LLM pipeline and retrieval orchestration framework rebranded toward the Haystack Enterprise Platform story.
tool.logoNotes: Official Haystack website logo asset (`/images/logos/haystack.png`). No separate brand-guidelines or media-kit page was found at review time, so this remains a homepage-sourced project logo pending a stronger primary source.
tool.practitionerNote: Strong option when retrieval pipelines and modular backend orchestration matter more than no-code UX or broad business-user automation.

dataResidency.detail: Python library runs in-process on customer infrastructure; no vendor data handling.

deployment.detail: OSS library self-hosted (Docker/K8s/VMs); deepset offers a managed Enterprise Platform.

auditLogging.detail: OSS library has no built-in audit log; operators integrate their own.

soc2.detail: OSS library N/A; the deepset-managed Haystack Enterprise Platform holds SOC 2.

iso27001.detail: OSS library N/A; the deepset Enterprise Platform holds ISO 27001.

iso42001.detail: Not mentioned in Haystack/deepset public compliance documentation.

euAiAct.detail: OSS pipeline framework, not an AI model/provider.
